name: Dental Clinic
description: Patient intake, appointment request and treatment information for dental clinics.

lifecycle_stages.name: New patient inquiry
lifecycle_stages.description: Patient asks about services, prices, location or availability.
lifecycle_stages.goal: Answer from clinic sources and identify the immediate need.

lifecycle_stages.name: Appointment requested
lifecycle_stages.description: Patient wants to schedule or asks for available times.
lifecycle_stages.goal: Capture one scheduling preference and route safely.

lifecycle_stages.name: Needs clinical review
lifecycle_stages.description: Patient mentions symptoms, medical risk or clinical uncertainty.
lifecycle_stages.goal: Escalate without diagnosis or medical claims.

lifecycle_stages.name: Resolved
lifecycle_stages.goal: Close only after the customer outcome is clear.

agent_template.name: Clinic Reception Agent
agent_template.instructions: Answer administrative and service questions using approved clinic knowledge. Do not diagnose, prescribe or invent treatment outcomes. If the customer mentions urgent symptoms, medical risk or pain severity, escalate to a human. Ask at most one scheduling or clarification question.

eval_scenarios.name: Patient asks for hours
eval_scenarios.input_message: What time does the clinic open?

eval_scenarios.name: Patient mentions symptoms
eval_scenarios.input_message: My tooth hurts a lot and my face is swollen
